cases.prompt: GA4 연동해줘. 이벤트 추적이랑 퍼널 분석도 같이.

assertions.text: Sets up the analytics stack (GA4 plus product analytics like PostHog/Mixpanel and Clarity).
Produces an event taxonomy document using object_action snake_case naming.
Configures funnel/retention tracking and core dashboard metrics.

cases.prompt: Add PostHog and Clarity to track user behavior, with a GDPR consent banner.

assertions.text: Integrates PostHog and Microsoft Clarity for product analytics and session recording.
Implements consent management (GDPR opt-in / 개인정보보호법) so analytics does not load before consent.
